summary: Game Tile Final AppleTV+ Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an archive AppleTV+ game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<away_team>, <home_team>, Final, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
